chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-369 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.02.2026. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ***************************************** Through this Petition, the Petitioner sought the following relief(s); a) That, this Honourable Court may kindly be pleased to direct the Respondent No.2 to 7 to provide legal protection to the petitioner from the hands of Respondent No.8 to 11 in accordance with law. b) That, this Honourable Court may kindly be pleased to direct the Respondent No.8 to 11 to provide protection to the petitioner from the hands of proposed accused persons. c) That, costs of petition may be awarded to the Petitioner. d) That, any other relief, which this Honourable Court deems fit and proper under the circumstances, may be awarded to the Petitioner. As per contention of Petitioner in her Petition, she seeks protection with regard to harassment allegedly caused by the private respondents. Learned A.A.G. Sindh states that no harassment would be caused to the Petitioners and the police officials shall act strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of along with listed application(s), if any, with directions to the police officials to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner. However, this order would not affect the legal proceedings, if any, pending or subsequently initiated by either party. Let a copy of this order be communicated to concerned official Respondent(s) for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
